message:
Add reusable changelog-adder GitHub Action

A composite action that uses Claude Code to automatically add
changelog entries to PRs. Uses the changelog:adder agent with
the changelog, git, and prose plugins from this marketplace.

Features:
- Analyzes PR changes and creates entry if user-facing
- Agent handles commit to PR branch
- Posts formatted PR comment with metadata table
- Silent skip when no entry needed

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+name: "Changelog Adder"
+description: "Add changelog entries to PRs using Claude Code"
+
+inputs:
+  anthropic_oauth_token:
+    description: "Claude Code OAuth token"
+    required: true
+  github_token:
+    description: "GitHub token for PR operations"
+    required: false
+    default: ${{ github.token }}
+
+outputs:
+  entry_created:
+    description: "Whether a changelog entry was created"
+    value: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.created }}
+  entry_file:
+    description: "Path to created changelog entry"
+    value: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.file }}
+
+runs:
+  using: "composite"
+  steps:
+    # Step 1: Capture existing changelog files
+    - name: Capture existing changelog files
+      id: before
+      shell: bash
+      run: |
+        find . -path "*/changelog/unreleased/*.md" -type f 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/changelog-before.txt
+
+    # Step 2: Run Claude with changelog:adder agent
+    - name: Run Claude changelog:adder
+      uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
+      with:
+        claude_code_oauth_token: ${{ inputs.anthropic_oauth_token }}
+        github_token: ${{ inputs.github_token }}
+        prompt: |
+          REPO: ${{ github.repository }}
+          PR NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
+          AUTHOR: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}
+
+          Analyze this PR and run /changelog:add if there are user-facing changes.
+          If you create an entry, commit it to this PR branch.
+          If there are no user-facing changes, do nothing.
+        claude_args: "--agent changelog:adder"
+        plugin_marketplaces: "https://github.com/tenzir/claude-plugins.git"
+        plugins: |
+          changelog@tenzir
+          git@tenzir
+          prose@tenzir
+
+    # Step 3: Detect new changelog entries
+    - name: Detect new entries
+      id: detect
+      shell: bash
+      run: |
+        find . -path "*/changelog/unreleased/*.md" -type f 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/changelog-after.txt
+        new_files=$(comm -13 /tmp/changelog-before.txt /tmp/changelog-after.txt)
+
+        if [ -z "$new_files" ]; then
+          echo "created=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          exit 0
+        fi
+
+        entry_file=$(echo "$new_files" | head -1)
+        echo "created=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+        echo "file=$entry_file" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+
+    # Step 4: Post PR comment
+    - name: Post PR comment
+      if: steps.detect.outputs.created == 'true'
+      shell: bash
+      env:
+        GH_TOKEN: ${{ inputs.github_token }}
+        ENTRY_FILE: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.file }}
+        PR_AUTHOR: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}
+        PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
+        BRANCH: ${{ github.head_ref }}
+      run: ${{ github.action_path }}/scripts/post-comment.sh

@@ -0,0 +1,50 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# Parse YAML frontmatter
+frontmatter=$(awk '/^---$/{if(++n==2)exit}n==1' "$ENTRY_FILE")
+title=$(echo "$frontmatter" | grep "^title:" | sed 's/^title: *//')
+type=$(echo "$frontmatter" | grep "^type:" | sed 's/^type: *//')
+pr=$(echo "$frontmatter" | grep "^pr:" | sed 's/^pr: *//')
+created=$(echo "$frontmatter" | grep "^created:" | sed 's/^created: *//')
+authors=$(echo "$frontmatter" | awk '/^authors:/,/^[^ ]/' | grep "^  - " | sed 's/^  - //' | paste -sd, -)
+
+# Extract body (everything after second ---)
+body=$(awk '/^---$/{if(++n==2){getline;found=1}}found' "$ENTRY_FILE")
+
+# Build comment
+cat >/tmp/pr-comment.md <<EOF
+@${PR_AUTHOR} A changelog entry has been added to this PR.
+
+## Metadata
+
+| Field | Value |
+|-------|-------|
+| Title | ${title} |
+| Type | \`${type}\` |
+| PR | #${pr:-$PR_NUMBER} |
+| Authors | ${authors} |
+| Created | ${created} |
+
+## Entry
+
+${body}
+
+---
+
+<details>
+<summary>Sync your local branch</summary>
+
+**Git:**
+\`\`\`bash
+git fetch origin && git reset --hard origin/${BRANCH}
+\`\`\`
+
+**Jujutsu:**
+\`\`\`bash
+jj git fetch && jj bookmark set ${BRANCH} -B
+\`\`\`
+</details>
+EOF
+
+gh pr comment "$PR_NUMBER" --body-file /tmp/pr-comment.md
